description: It’s been a good experience overall, I haven’t have any problems, my doubts have been solved in a timely manner.
author: Maria R.
pros: Skuad helps me with all my requests it’s easy to solve all my doubts and handles my payments wonderfully
cons: I get confused on the platform, I would like to have a better guidance or advice on how to use it in therms of creating the different types of requests.

description: A very positive experience over all, I've had support for all of my questions and concerns.
author: Oscar M.
pros: Their platform; the fact that it's easy to find and keep track of everything and anything.
cons: The only thing I don't like is that they have no mobile app or mobile web-app support.

author: Annie Y.
pros: The affordable monthly price and the initial sales experience.
cons: Skuad told me they do payroll in Nigeria so I trusted them. It turns out they have been taking the money I am paying them and only paying my employee her net income. They have been keeping income taxes for themselves for the last three months instead of remitting to the government because they haven't even been registered yet with the Nigerian state that my employee lives in. Some honesty beforehand would have been nice. Now I am the one asking for status updates. You promised to give me a status update "sometime next week" and I waited all Monday of Friday last week, you didn't follow through with your promise of giving me the status update. So now that is a 1 star review for withholding information and not following through with your promise. Email me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience has been excellent. Since the company began managing the service through Skuad, I haven’t had a single issue with my payroll. Everything has been handled promptly and professionally.
author: Raul H.
pros: I really appreciate how, after the initial setup, everything runs smoothly and effortlessly—there’s nothing to worry about. It feels reliable and low-maintenance
cons: Honestly, I haven’t encountered anything significantly negative. Nothing stands out as worth mentioning.

description: It's 100% recommendable to share to our friends in the field.
author: Mary Ann P.
pros: As an employee using Skuad as my timekeeping, all I can say is that this platform is so easy to use. Even a new user can learn to navigate it faster.
cons: I like everything about Skuad but the least that I like is when there is an update.

review_title: Best tool for offshore invoicing and payments
description: I use the product only for invoicing and payments and at this moment very satisfied overall with it.
author: Ashok J.
pros: Ease of navigation and basic things such as updating the profile, etc. The support team has been phenomenal.
cons: Many a times, when I open a support request, I have to wait a few hours to get a response and I would be offline when the response arrives. I am notified of a response via email, which is good, but a more real-time experience would be something that would make it perfect.

author: Kanwarjeet S.
pros: It’s really easy to use and you can everything in one place like play slips, documents, offer letter etc. and they quickly solves the tickets
cons: For now I didn’t found any con in skuad. So no cons from my side

description: Great. Very easy and efficient. The customer care experience is great too, very fast response.
author: Kishnu P.
pros: The information, efficiency and the idea of everything in one place. User friendly dashboard as well
cons: Nothing in particular. Maybe a small improvement in putting the contact details of each region in the dashboard. Easier for loan applications
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Why I give Skuad (now; Payoneer Workforce Management) 5 stars
description: Working remotely, I find Skuad pretty efficient and smooth especially when it comes to invoicing. And of course The most important part is they disburse the funds on time, so yeah, I give them 5 stars.
author: James W.
pros: I like that I can track and manage my paid leave and unpaid leaves with ease. I also like the feature for adding and invoicing expenses to my employer.
cons: I didn't like that the customer service doesn't respond on weekends, so if you have any queries on a Saturday, you'll probably have to wait until Monday morning for it to be resolved.

description: Good. Tax queries and other HR Queries solved on time. Keep improving the UI. Change UI themes periodically, allow periodic gift coupons on birthdays.
author: Sumit A.
pros: Good platform/UI to handle, view or track most of the employee stuff. Employee support for queries is always on time as well.
cons: Holiday calendar availability takes some time at start of year for me. Nothing else.

description: It is really good, i have not had a big issue
author: Camila C.
pros: The efficiency of response when you make a request
cons: Would like to have important information said beforehand in a timely manner

description: Good, most of the times it has worked fine
author: Juan M.
pros: The dashboard provides all the information clearly and easy to read
cons: I had issues with my days off because it was showing as no balance, but it was solved quickly

review_title: Es un excelente plataforma, pero el costo quedo alto
description: Es un excelente plataforma, pero en lo que respecta a costos se ha vuelto bastante cara, y eso hace que cada vez menos personas la elijan
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Es muy facil de usar, la gestion de clientes es muy rapida, los pocos problemas y las consultas fueron rapidamente resueltas.
cons: Los empleados se quejan de las altas comisiones y costos de transferencia. No es el metodo de pago que en general eligen
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mukesh K.
pros: SKUAD is truly the best Employer of Record for me. Their seamless onboarding process made transitioning effortless. From payroll management to compliance, SKUAD ensures I can focus on my work without HR concerns. Highly recommended for anyone seeking reliable employment support
cons: none so far. yet to face any major issue with them.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Sam T.
pros: The team are on hand to support every step of the way with experts in each country to assist with the paperwork and local rule and regulations.
cons: Claiming back expenses the cut off point is way before the payment date meaning expenses often take am long time to be paid out.

review_title: Great platform for remote work - Work from everywhere without differences
description: At first they were slow in answering questions, but then they improved and now I have to say that the attention is nice. The platform allows me to see everything online whenever I want, without any paperwork, and if the company needs to change conditions or add information, they can do so instantly, wherever and whenever they want. All are great advantages!!
author: Estefania C.
pros: I can work for another country from my own without any difference with a company in the same country.
cons: It is not well customized by country in terms of work permits, working hours... especially in terms of sick days, bankholidays...

description: Overall experience is positive and slightly improvement needed in PF policy
author: Ashish S.
pros: platform is user friendly and help request feature is great. Easy to navigate and responses from team are really quick and helpful.
cons: PF benefits; I don't like the fixed 1800, i would be more fair if it were 12% of basic salary instead.

review_title: Skuad - Powerhouse HR Team - Great Service
description: Overall it was pleasant. Looking forward on working on you guys again in the future.
author: Lea A.
pros: I like the service, people and their solution. I never had issues with payrolls and govt contributions. Supports are responsive.
cons: I can't think of any. I've seen a lot of improvement. Maybe a little more informations on Payslip. e.i. Company name, date hired, etc

review_title: Very quick and efficient HR and payroll service provider
description: It has been amazing till now. Way better than I had expected. I was hesitant to go with skuad initially given I hadnt heard much about it but its been great.
author: Anupam N.
pros: Very quick revert, no matter how small your query is, you will almost get an instant revert. And team will get on top of it, trying its best to solve it at the earliest. And not just one team member, but it goes as far as it goes. It is literally quite amazing.
cons: No cons as such till now, skuad has been helpful throughout, from changing delivery location for office items after very quick confirmations to solving and assigning people to sort the query at the earliest.

review_title: Skuad Makes International Team Management Simple and Efficient
description: Skuad made global hiring seamless for our company. The onboarding process was smooth, and their team provided clear guidance at every step. We could hire talent across multiple countries without worrying about compliance.
author: Jayesh J.
pros: I like how Skuad simplifies global hiring and compliance. It saves us from navigating complex local labor laws and lets us focus on growing our team.
cons: Sometimes, processing payroll or approvals takes longer than expected, which can affect timelines. and support ticket reply also takes time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Skuad, a good asset when enrolling to your new job.
description: Skuad helped me with the enrolling process a year ago when I started my job. They were always very clear and helpfull when telling me what part of the process I was on and what was needed to be able to continue. They've been on time with everything regarding my pays and make it really easy to apply for time offs.
author: Laura Camila A.
pros: I like how easy the process of enrolling in my company was and that they comply with whatever they promise. The website is also really easy to use and navigate and the representatives are nice.
cons: I wish when applying for time off I could talk to a person because I feel like sometimes the details one puts in the request are not read and when special situations come up those are important.

description: Its a payroll management tool that my company uses to help manage payroll for employees that live in a different country, like me, and at that is a very useful tool
author: Ricardo V.
pros: Easy UI, very easy to understand how to navigate through its menus, and is also very fast and eficient
cons: The colour palete is kind of annoying, I would like to change it, maybe it would be nice to get a dark mode
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall, my experience with Skuad has been satisfactory. The platform is easy to use, and the support team is responsive—help requests are handled quickly, and issues are resolved efficiently. However, the recent delay in health insurance renewals, despite multiple follow-up emails, was disappointing. Addressing such concerns promptly would further enhance the overall experience.
author: Vijay M.
pros: Product is easy to use, with quick help requests, fast issue resolution, and clear communication....
cons: Benefits are limited compared to others; health insurance renewals took too long despite repeated follow-ups.

description: They have great people to assist you when needed, so you can be sure that they will take care of your needs while working
author: Richard G.
pros: They provide really good support when needed, and the platform is quitye easy to use. Onborading process was good.
cons: When trying to upload documents to request a sick leave or any other kind of permission that was not possible. Now it is fixed.

description: Great experience with Skuad till now. The hr related and all finance related things they take care.
author: Reshma P.
pros: Value for money. Helping workforce. Very helpful with employee management and other tasks assigned to them
cons: Nothing specific to be mentioned as bad points for them. They are really helpful and friendly people.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
